# Exploratory Data Analysis on Retail Sales Dataset

## Oasis Infobyte Internship

### Objective

The objective of this project is to analyze retail sales data using Python to identify customer trends, sales performance, and actionable business insights.

## Technologies Used

- Python
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Matplotlib
- Seaborn
- Jupyter Notebook

## Analysis Performed

- Dataset Inspection
- Missing Value Analysis
- Statistical Summary
- Monthly Sales Trend
- Customer Age Distribution
- Gender Analysis
- Product Category Analysis
- Revenue Analysis
- Correlation Heatmap
- Business Recommendations

## Dataset

Retail Sales Dataset
